Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Kitchen Remodel to get the job done right.

“Summit transformed our 1920s bungalow kitchen with cabinets that look original but function like new. They matched the existing trim perfectly and even incorporated vintage-style hardware. A year later, the drawers still glide smoothly despite Chicago's humidity changes.”

Marta K. Custom Cabinetry
Mar 15, 2025

“Living in a high-rise, I wanted tech without a sterile look. Summit installed hidden charging drawers, under-cabinet lighting that automatically adjusts for natural light, and a faucet that remembers my preferred water temperature—all while maintaining our kitchen's elegant aesthetic.”

James T. Smart Kitchen Upgrades
Feb 28, 2025

“Our quartz counters have survived two Chicago winters and endless meal prep without a single stain. The team did an incredible job installing around our uneven walls—you'd never know our building is over 100 years old. The integrated sink is a game-changer for cleanup.”

Anika P. Luxury Countertops
Jan 10, 2025

“Our Evanston kitchen went from cramped to functional without expanding the footprint. Summit designed a clever work triangle that accommodates multiple cooks (common in our house) and added storage solutions I wouldn't have imagined. The peninsula gives us much-needed seating too.”

Derek L. Kitchen Layout Design
Nov 22, 2024

“The herringbone backsplash Summit installed is stunning and practical—the dark grout hides splatters from our frequent cooking. They took extra care to level the wall first, resulting in a flawless surface. A year later, not a single tile has loosened despite temperature swings.”

Sophia R. Premium Tile Work
Oct 5, 2024

“From demo to final touches, Summit handled our Naperville kitchen remodel with professionalism. They coordinated all the subs, kept the project on schedule despite supply delays, and protected our hardwood floors throughout. The attention to detail—like aligning the countertop grain with the backsplash—shows their craftsmanship.”

Carlos M. Complete Kitchen Remodel
Sep 18, 2024
Summit Kitchen Remodel

Trusted kitchen remodel professionals serving Chicago, IL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
